hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,os,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=(d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path') or ''; root=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.getcwd(); sys.exit(0) if not fp.endswith('.md') else subprocess.run(['python3', os.path.join(root,'scripts','context_graph_cli.py'),'ingest-markdown'], input=json.dumps({'rootPath': os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(fp)), 'graphPath': os.path.join(root,'data','graph.json')}), text=True, capture_output=True, timeout=20, cwd=root)" 2>/dev/null || true
